reviews.comment:
Worst cafe I have experienced in my life.
We visited here on 13 September 2025.

The food is extremely expensive. And the quantity is very less. When we order any dish, we expect a full plate of it, but they just gave two bytes of the dish. This is really hopeless.

Also the taste is not good. Service is also very slow.

So never visit at this place. It is a complete waste of money.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Jatin, 
We hear you and take your feedback very seriously. The concerns you’ve highlighted around taste, quantity, and service speed are already being addressed with our team at Amanora. We’d love to understand your experience better and make amends. Please reach out to us via DM on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect personally and improve your experience .
